reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The lack of a flat surface for a laptop or keyboard, combined with the white color scheme, makes it difficult to set up a productive workstation. The presence of white furniture and decor further undermines the suitability for focused solo work.
